label: algorithm-workflow
articleTitle: How to deploy battery swapping stations for electric vehicles
authors: Li Z, Yang Z, Wang S, et al.
plotSummary: refer to this option when an article contains methodological innovations and requires the description of complex algorithms. The article should provide a clear and detailed explanation of the algorithmic workflow, including any novel techniques or approaches used. Skip when the innovation of the whole text is not in the algorithm (refering to 全文思路).

label: 全文思路
articleTitle: Examining the causal impacts of the built environment on cycling activities using time-series street view imagery
journalORmeeting: Transportation Research Part A: Policy and Practice
authors: Ito K, Bansal P, Biljecki F.
plotSummary: refer to this option when an article uses ≥3 data sources and ≥2 model methods, skip when the user requests generating an algorithm mechanism diagram (see algorithm-workflow).

label: 技术路线-模型数据
articleTitle: Novel spatiotemporal nonlinear regression approach for unveiling the impact of urban spatial morphology on carbon emissions
authors: Li L, Sun S, Zhong L, et al.
plotSummary: refer to this option when an article uses multiple models to study the problem in sequence or when the author requests the generation of a technical roadmap.

label: 数据处理流程
articleTitle: Developing improved time-series DMSP-OLS-Like data (1992–2019) in China by integrating DMSP-OLS and SNPP-VIIRS
journalORmeeting: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
authors: Wu Y, Shi K, Chen Z, et al.
plotSummary: refer to this option when the user requests the generation of a data processing technology roadmap and the article contains a detailed description of the data processing process.

label: review-structure
